prompt_text:
### Demographics: 66-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Major Depressive Disorder
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~15 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 53.2 kg; Height 161.1 cm; BMI 20.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 139/84 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.1%; 9 months ago 7.9%; 6 months ago 8.2%; 3 months ago 8.1%; current 8.0%), FPG (12 months ago 221mg/dL; 9 months ago 189mg/dL; 6 months ago 196mg/dL; 3 months ago 180mg/dL; current 199mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 54.2kg; 9 months ago 50.7kg; 6 months ago 50.1kg; 3 months ago 48.2kg; current 53.2kg), Height (12 months ago 161.1cm; 9 months ago 161.1cm; 6 months ago 161.1cm; 3 months ago 161.1cm; current 161.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 18.0kg/m²; current 20.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 137mmHg; 9 months ago 137mmHg; 6 months ago 140mmHg; 3 months ago 139mmHg; current 139mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 83mmHg; 9 months ago 85mmHg; 6 months ago 86mmHg; 3 months ago 86mmHg; current 84mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 61U/L; 9 months ago 68U/L; 6 months ago 56U/L; 3 months ago 63U/L; current 65U/L), AST (12 months ago 37U/L; 9 months ago 31U/L; 6 months ago 27U/L; 3 months ago 27U/L; current 34U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; current 51mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 101mg/g; 9 months ago 115mg/g; 6 months ago 92mg/g; 3 months ago 121mg/g; current 123mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 81mg/dL; 9 months ago 79mg/dL; 6 months ago 78mg/dL; 3 months ago 80mg/dL; current 77mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 57mg/dL; 9 months ago 54mg/dL; 6 months ago 56mg/dL; 3 months ago 56mg/dL; current 55mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 162mg/dL; 9 months ago 144mg/dL; 6 months ago 140mg/dL; 3 months ago 144mg/dL; current 152mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.8g/dL; 9 months ago 11.4g/dL; 6 months ago 10.6g/dL; 3 months ago 11.3g/dL; current 10.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.82 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
